workloads.name: Claims settlement batch
workloads.narrative: Claims settlement carries high business impact, long batch windows, and limited API boundaries.
workloads.nextAction: Wrap settlement reads behind a stable API and fund a strangler path for the highest-change COBOL modules.

workloads.name: Policy premium rating
workloads.narrative: Rating logic changes faster than the surrounding mainframe control plane can safely absorb.
workloads.nextAction: Create contract tests around premium calculations and isolate pricing tables before service extraction.

workloads.name: Treasury reconciliation
workloads.narrative: Treasury reconciliation is controlled but tightly coupled to downstream financial close windows.
workloads.nextAction: Publish data lineage and exception ownership before changing close-critical reconciliation steps.

workloads.name: Member eligibility lookup
workloads.narrative: Eligibility has high volume but cleaner interface boundaries than the batch-heavy lanes.
workloads.nextAction: Keep API wrapper posture and raise regression coverage before attempting deeper decomposition.
